description_long: This object is a classic Pentax film camera, featuring a robust rectangular body with a textured black grip and metallic silver top and bottom plates. The front displays a prominent lens assembly with a large, round lens cap marked 'PENTAX', and several dials and buttons for manual controls. The top of the camera includes a film advance lever, shutter button, and a hot shoe for attaching accessories. On the back, there is a viewfinder and a film compartment door, which is currently labeled with a colorful sticker indicating film type. The sides of the camera show metal strap lugs and additional control dials, with the right side housing the film rewind knob. The overall design is utilitarian and durable, typical of vintage SLR cameras, with a mix of metal and plastic components.
description: A vintage Pentax film camera with a silver and black body, prominent lens, manual control dials, and a textured grip. The camera features classic SLR styling and a visible film compartment label.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large lens with 'PENTAX' branding, textured grip, and top control dials.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the lens barrel, focus and aperture rings, and the film rewind knob.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the viewfinder, film compartment door with a colorful film label, and top dials.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the grip, strap lug, and additional control dials.
